name: guided_player_system_prompt
description: GUIDED-PLAYER system prompt: the 4-shot directive prompt used by agents.LLMPlayer for the original Phase A run (already completed). Few-shot examples remain in agents.py:LLMPlayer._FEW_SHOT (see prompts/llm_player_prompts.{txt,json} for the full transcript and per-shot rationale). This sidecar locks the system-prompt text portion only.
